title: Better is One Day

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Oh, how lovely is Your dwelling place,
Where my heart finds its solace, grace.
My soul yearns, even faints for You,
In courts of love, my life renew.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Even the sparrow has found her home,
The swallow rests where she won’t roam.
Blessed are those who dwell near,
Singing praises free of fear.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Better is one day in Your embrace,
Than thousands lost in a distant place.
Your love, it shines, forever stays,
Guiding my heart through endless days.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: My strength is born from Your endless streams,
A well of hope, a place of dreams.
Through valleys dry, I walk in peace,
Your blessings flow, my doubts release.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: No good thing will You withhold,
To hearts upright, pure, and bold.
O Lord of hosts, my King, my Sun,
With You, the battle is always won.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Better is one day in Your embrace,
Than thousands lost in a distant place.
Your love, it shines, forever stays,
Guiding my heart through endless days.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Blessed are those who trust in You,
Forever strong, forever true.

epigraph: For a day in thy courts is better than a thousand. I had rather be
